user_message: Can you pull the context on Treyarch Global? I need to create the summary.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Laura Schmidt <laura.schmidt@treyarchglob.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-17 14:32 EST
Subject: Follow-up: account health Review

Just checking in on the account health proposal. Our DevOps Lead is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
To: Laura Schmidt <laura.schmidt@treyarchglob.com>
Date: 2024-02-17 13:37 EST
Subject: URGENT: account health Issue at Treyarch Global

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about account health. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

Meeting: account health Discussion - Treyarch Global
Date: 2024-01-26
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Laura Schmidt (Treyarch Global), Raj Mehta (Microsoft), Michelle (Treyarch Global)

[00:01:15] Laura Schmidt (Treyarch Global): Appreciate everyone making time. The main agenda today is account health.

[00:05:00] Michelle (Treyarch Global): The timeline for resource allocation is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:09:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on performance requirements and found that the cost projections need to factor in reserved instance pricing for accuracy.

[00:11:00] Laura Schmidt (Treyarch Global): On the account health front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around timeline constraints.

[00:16:00] Michelle (Treyarch Global): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is data residency.

[00:18:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is technical validation.

[00:22:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): Our CTO reviewed this and has concerns about resource allocation. Can we address those?

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF11-L trap (Draft-only posture delays time-sensitive sends); produces complete One-page brief with attendee context, account snapshot, talking points, likely objections, open item
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF11-L failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF11-L failure mode (Draft-only posture delays time-sensitive sends)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct account health decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF11-L -- Draft-only posture delays time-sensitive sends
Guardrail axis scored neutrally -- focus on whether output served the user's actual need
